payload.title: Safety Stock Strategy for Rail Fasteners
payload.context:
We manage railway track fittings across 5 depots in the Northern zone. 
Current inventory levels are low due to supply chain delays. 
We need to decide on a restocking strategy before the monsoon season.
Budget constraint: ₹50 lakhs
payload.notes:
+ Option A: Lower total inventory cost through consolidation
+ Option A: Easier quality control from single source
- Option A: Higher transportation costs to distant depots
- Option A: Single point of failure risk
+ Option B: Faster delivery to local depots
+ Option B: Reduced transportation time
- Option B: Higher overall inventory costs
- Option B: More complex management across locations
+ Option C: No upfront inventory investment
+ Option C: Vendor expertise in demand forecasting
- Option C: Less control over inventory
- Option C: Dependency on vendor reliability

options.label: Option A: Centralized depot with high safety stock
Option B: Distributed local buffers at each depot
Option C: Vendor-managed inventory with weekly replenishment

analysisSummary.title: Safety Stock Strategy for Rail Fasteners
analysisSummary.suggestedOptionLabel: Option A: Centralized depot with high safety stock

payload.title: Choose maintenance strategy for Track Section A
payload.context: Mainline section with high traffic density. Must maintain 99.5% uptime. Budget limit: ₹50 Lakhs.
payload.notes:
+ Option A: Faster response time (reduces downtime by 2 hours)
+ Option A: Lower labor cost (₹500/hour vs ₹800/hour)
- Option A: Less specialized training
- Option B: Higher initial investment (₹30 Lakhs equipment)
+ Option B: Better quality repairs
- Option B: Longer lead time for specialized parts

options.label: Option A: Easy Labor - Use local contract workers for quick repairs.
Option B: Tough for access - Use specialized equipment with limited availability.

analysisSummary.title: Choose maintenance strategy for Track Section A
analysisSummary.suggestedOptionLabel: Option A: Easy Labor - Use local contract workers for quick repairs.
